summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 11 - Photo System & Login Page Changes Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working - Login page cleaned (no credentials visible), 'Acessar ambiente de demonstração' button present, PhotoUploader component working on OS Detail (Foto Antes/Depois), Inspeção Detail (Registro Fotográfico), and Anomalias (Fotos do Problema).

Backend: POST /api/attachments - upload foto_depois for work order

Backend: POST /api/attachments - upload photo for anomaly

new_features_verified.description: Removed credentials text (admin@manutrix.com / admin123), replaced with 'Acessar ambiente de demonstração' button that calls /api/seed
Reusable component with camera/file upload, photo grid, fullscreen viewer, delete functionality, required indicator
Two side-by-side photo sections with red dashed border and 'Foto obrigatória' text for corretiva type
Photo section with required indicator when checklist has non-conforme items
Each anomalia card has photo upload section for documenting problems
Backend enforces photo attachment before closing corretiva/falha type OS

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo system fully implemented and tested. PhotoUploader component at line ~3605 in App.js accepts entityType, entityId, categoria, label, required props. Uses /api/attachments endpoints. OS Detail (line ~2785) has Foto Antes (categoria='foto_antes') and Foto Depois (categoria='foto_depois') side by side with required=true for corretiva/falha types. Inspeção Detail (line ~3370) has Registro Fotográfico with required=true when checklist has non-conforme items. Anomalias (line ~3888) has Fotos do Problema for each anomalia card. Backend enforces photo requirement for closing corretiva OS at line ~1351. Login page cleaned - no credentials visible, 'Acessar ambiente de demonstração' button calls /api/seed.
